failure.message: AssertionError: WebSocket ping/pong failed assert False

testcase.name: test_calendar_events_endpoint

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'events' in {'data': [{'all_day': False, 'assigned_to': [], 'color': '#a0789e', 'created_at': '2026-04-28T14:10:54.518706+00:00', ...}, {'all_day': False, 'assigned_to': [], 'beo_notes': '', 'color': None, ...}, {'all_day': False, 'assigned_to': [], 'beo_notes': '', 'color': None, ...}, {'all_day': False, 'assigned_to': [], 'beo_notes': '', 'color': None, ...}, {'created_at': '2026-04-08T21:03:54.307000+00:00', 'end': '2026-03-17T18:00:00Z', 'event_type': 'event', 'guest_count': 500, ...}, {'all_day': False, 'assigned_to': [], 'beo_notes': 'Package: Banquet Plated Dinner. Guest count: 250.', 'created_at': '2026-04-14T14:24:26.139981+00:00', ...}, ...], 'total': 10}
